svg.title: Wok engine crate hierarchy
svg.desc: The Wok engine spans three sibling repositories: pantry (platform substrate, complete), wok-engine (workspace containing all wok-* crates plus an integration smoke-test), and a future game repo. Inside wok-engine, crates are layered by dependency: wok-scene at the bottom (complete), wok-content above it (currently being planned), wok-render/wok-physics/wok-anim/wok-light as subsystem crates (future), and wok-shell plus the smoke-test at the top as consumers. Dependencies flow downward.
